title: Fighting ‘Sacred’ War in Ukraine, North Korea and Russia Pledge to Deepen Ties
summary_full: The two countries discussed long-term military cooperation, as they opened a memorial for North Korean troops killed in Russia’s war in Ukraine.
summary_public: The two countries discussed long-term military cooperation, as they opened a memorial for North Korean troops killed in Russia’s war in Ukraine.
